title: Hugs & Kisses - Hand/Foot print 12 month Photo Frame with Ink pad for Baby Boy and Girl
features: BEAUTIFUL QUALITY: The Hugs & Kisses range is adorable and chic. The quality of the products featured in this brand are second to none, and each product is perfect to give as high quality gifts for any occasion.

SIMPLE DESIGN: The simple and clean design displays elegant style in this photo frame. The design features delicate drawings of hearts, rabbits and a bear. The colours presented are neutral grey, yellow and also touches of both pink and blue which makes the frame unisex so even perfect as a gift if the sex of the baby is unknown.
description: AGE MILESTONES: This frame presents 12 smaller sized opening slots to place your favourite photos from each month of your babies first year. The larger opening is reserved for a special foot & hand print which makes for a beautiful keepsake. We can't stop your little one from growing, but we sure can help you create and cherish a unique and special keepsake to remember their first year. PERFECT PRESENT - Our my first year photo frame is beautiful & would make a perfect present to celebrate your baby's very special first birthday, or even a photo frame to the parents of a little one who is just turning one! It makes an ideal gift to give for a First Birthday, Baby Shower or Christening. BEAUTIFUL QUALITY: The Hugs & Kisses range is adorable and chic. The quality of the products featured in this brand are second to none, and each product is perfect to give as high quality gifts for any occasion.SIMPLE DESIGN: The simple and clean design displays elegant style in this photo frame. The design features delicate drawings of hearts, rabbits and a bear. The colours presented are neutral grey, yellow and also touches of both pink and blue which makes the frame unisex so even perfect as a gift if the sex of the baby is unknown. LASTING MEMORIES: The frame is a beautiful keepsake which keeps track of the babies progress. It also comes with an ink pad for you to stamp the frame with the babies footprint and hand print which is a lovely sentiment to look back on over the years. The colour of the ink is grey, so again ideal as a unisex gift. The ink is also toxic-free and completely safe to use on your babies hands and feet. FRAME SIZE: 38.5cm x 21cm x 2cm

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Clean with a dry or slightly damp cloth and regular dust.
